questions.question: Which statement best describes *Course 3 (Newtonian Mechanics)** will answer **why objects move** by introducing forces, Newton's laws, free-body diagrams, friction, tension, and equilibrium.?

*Course 3 (Newtonian Mechanics)** will answer **why objects move** by introducing forces, Newton's laws, free-body diagrams, friction, tension, and equilibrium. is only applicable in theoretical contexts.
questions.explanation: *Course 3 (Newtonian Mechanics)** will answer **why objects move** by introducing forces, Newton's laws, free-body diagrams, friction, tension, and equilibrium. has many practical applications.
